subject: LIGO/Virgo S191220af: Retraction of GW compact binary merger candidate
submitter: Nelson Christensen at Obs.de la Cote dAzur,Nice  <nelson.christensen@oca.eu>
body:
The LIGO Scientific Collaboration and the Virgo Collaboration report:

The trigger S191220af is no longer considered to be a candidate of
Interest due to severe nonstationarity in L1 data.
